name: Broccoli Salad with Vinaigrette Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam the broccoli until fork-tender.
2. In a large bowl, whisk together oil, vinegar, minced garlic, orange juice, and mustard.
3. Add the broccoli to the dressing and toss to combine.
4. Sprinkle grated carrot over the salad before serving.
Food Exchanges per Serving: 1 VEGETABLE EXCHANGE + 1 FAT EXCHANGE
CAL: 58; PRO: 2g; CAR: 8g; FAT: 6g; SOD: 47;
Makes 4 servings.
Quick & Easy Diabetic Menus by Betty Wedman, M.S., R.D.
Brought to you and yours via Nancy O'Brion and her Meal-Master
